win_condition: First to 2 sequences wins (2 players/teams) or 1 sequence (3 players/teams)
message: Sequence is a race game. Get 5 chips in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) to form a sequence. With 2 players or 2 teams, first to 2 sequences wins. With 3 players or 3 teams, first to 1 sequence wins. Corner spaces are free for all players.
